MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Gina Gonzales/Philomena Dias, CSR: Lisa Schwam.
Edward O. Lee, Esq., for Plaintiff: Kindred Nursing Centers West, LLC, a Delaware Limited Liability Company, dba The Tunnel Center for Rehabilitation and Healthcare.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: John R. Zavaleta, an individual; Maxilinda R. Zavaleta, an individual; John R. Zavaleta, as Trustee of the John R. Zavaleta, Sr. and Maxilinda R. Zavaleta Revocable Living Trust Dated December 15, 1991; Maxilinda R. Zavaleta, as Trustee of the John R. Zavaleta, Sr. and Maxilinda R. Zavaleta Revocable Living Trust Dated December 15, 1991 as follows:
Damages/Principal $25,807.60
Prejudgment Interest $2,108.33
Attorney's Fees $800.00
Costs $545.00, for a total of $29,260.93
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated to the return of Exhibits 1-7.
